title: Birbified
description: This project was a random thing I am somewhat passionate about and I like adding stupid things
body:
This is a mod I made for my smp, wasn't really meant to be serious obivously but it seemed funny to upload. I plan on uploading many new versions and updating regularly. 

The mod currently only has 5 mobs but I plan to add more in the near future. The mod also has a custom dimention that has no sun or any light source making it completely dark, it doesn't serve a very big purpose towards the mod yet but its the only way to obtain the custom ore added.
There are also some very broken weapons added right now, mainly as a joke.
hope you enjoy the mod :>
